workloads.name: buffer-upload 64KB
workloads.description: Single upload command aligned with Dawn BufferUploadPerf WriteBuffer 64KB.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Matched single queue write upload shape on both sides; uses deferred queue sync on Metal to avoid per-command wait inflation while preserving per-upload normalization.

timingNormalization.note: Upload microbenchmark mode: run 500 uploads per Fawn sample, use explicit size-tuned submit cadence (64KB uses submitEvery=100) with deferred queue sync, and normalize to per-upload units.

reasons: left timed sample count 4 is below claim floor 7
right timed sample count 4 is below claim floor 7

workloads.name: matrix-vector multiply 32768x2048 f32 (workgroupshared swizzle1)
workloads.description: Matrix-vector compute kernel aligned to Dawn MatrixVectorMultiplyPerf dimensions (Rows=32768, Cols=2048, F32/F32, Impl=WorkgroupShared, Swizzle=1, 100 dispatches).
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples matrix-vector contract aligned to Dawn MatrixVectorMultiplyPerf variant geometry and per-dispatch normalization; retains per-command queue sync on Metal until deferred queue flush timeout instability is resolved.

timingNormalization.note: Dawn MatrixVectorMultiplyPerf already reports per-dispatch metrics (iterationsPerStep=100 internal normalization). Fawn executes repeat=100 and divides by leftTimingDivisor=100 to match per-dispatch units.

reasons: left side has no successful execution samples (executionSuccessCount=0)
left side reported execution errors in 4/4 samples
